phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il Corridoio Vasari, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel kor-REE-doH-yoh vah-ZAH-ree, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Sopra il ponte, non accessibile ora.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOHP-rah EEL POHN-teh NOHN ahch-cheh-ssee-BEE-leh OH-rah
likely_response.translation_en: Above the bridge, not accessible now.

responses.english: Above the bridge, not accessible now.
responses.phonetic: SOHP-rah EEL POHN-teh NOHN ahch-cheh-ssee-BEE-leh OH-rah
responses.local: Sopra il ponte, non accessibile ora.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, si possono fare foto qui, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see POSS-oh-noh FAH-reh FOH-toh KWEE, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, without flash in the shops.

responses.english: Yes, without flash in the shops.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono bagni pubblici vicino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh BAH-nyee POOB-blee-chee vee-CHEE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa questo anello, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah KWEH-stoh ah-NEL-loh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The price is on the tag.

responses.english: The price is on the tag.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiudono i negozi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah KYOO-doh-noh ee neh-GOHT-syee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove sono le botteghe di gioielli, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh SOH-noh leh bot-TEH-geh dee jyo-YEL-lee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Su entrambi i lati del ponte.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO ehnt-RAHM-bee EE LAH-tee DEHL POHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: On both sides of the bridge.

responses.english: On both sides of the bridge.
responses.phonetic: SOO ehnt-RAHM-bee EE LAH-tee DEHL POHN-teh
responses.local: Su entrambi i lati del ponte.
